mapper.select: select * from gb_department_bill as gdb where gdb.gb_DB_wx_out_trade_no = #{ordersSn}
select * from gb_department_bill as gdb where gdb.gb_DB_wx_out_trade_no = #{ordersSn}
select * from gb_department_bill where gb_db_platform_submit_token = #{value} and gb_db_bill_source = 'PLATFORM_CASH' limit 1

select * from gb_department_bill where gb_db_bill_source = 'PLATFORM_CASH' and gb_db_pay_status in ('AWAIT_FIRST_PAY', 'AWAIT_SUPPLEMENT') and (gb_DB_dep_id = #{value} or gb_DB_dep_father_id = #{value}) order by case gb_db_pay_status when 'AWAIT_FIRST_PAY' then 1 when 'AWAIT_SUPPLEMENT' then 2 else 3 end, gb_department_bill_id desc limit 1
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_department_bill where gb_department_bill_id in
#{gbDepartmentBillId}
